title: BPE Transformer on AMD Kria KR260 FPGA
description: Hardware-accelerated language model inference on FPGA, offloading INT8 matrix multiplications and multi-head attention to programmable logic with weights in on-chip BRAM. Achieved ~6-7x overall speedup over CPU with real-time autoregressive generation.

title: Autonomous Robotic Car (MDP)
description: Designed and implemented a deterministic STM32 RTOS architecture for motion and safety-critical control, with a 5-task pipeline (Communication → Control → Motor + IMU/Encoder) using priority scheduling, semaphore-gated sensor timers, and queue-based decoupling. Built the RPi multiprocess orchestration layer bridging Bluetooth Android control, camera-based image recognition (via API inference), and serial STM command flow with ACK-gated sequencing.

title: AI-Powered Self-Regulated Learning System
description: Dual-channel AI tutoring system with novel evaluation metrics (GSS, RDS), intelligent journaling, SWOT-based self-insight, and auto-generated micro-quizzes. A 3-week study (n=15) showed +21% quiz score improvement and +22 min/session engagement.

title: Hardware Trojan Detection Using AI
description: AI-powered security tool detecting malicious modifications in RTL code and GDSII layouts using Graph Neural Networks and anomaly detection, designed as a pre-silicon checkpoint for IC design houses and defence organisations.

title: Hybrid Protein Secondary Structure Prediction
description: Four-generation deep learning architecture progression culminating in HybridPSSP v4, fusing Transformer encoders, dilated residual CNNs, and ESM embeddings. Achieved Q3 macro-F1 of 0.8707, approaching state-of-the-art on CB513.

title: Emergent Individuality in Neural Networks
description: Research demonstrating that identically initialised RNNs develop distinct internal dynamics purely through experiential history. A linear decoder identified which of 4 experiential streams a network underwent with 1.000 accuracy, using biologically-inspired Hebbian sleep consolidation.
